reason: Question asks if transit movement of a road train >8t is allowed in this sign's zone; answer=Заборонено. Sign 3.3 (truck silhouette in red circle) prohibits trucks/road trains over the mass shown (here 8т). Official base sign from Wikimedia Commons (File:UA road sign 3.3.svg); verified PNG shows black truck in red circle. Note: question depicts it with value '8 т'; base official sign omits the numeric value.
